name: Sega Sammy Holdings Inc.
summary: Sega Sammy Holdings Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the game machine, entertainment contents, and resort businesses. The company's Pachislot and Pachinko Machines Business segment develops, manufactures, and sells pachislot and pachinko machines. Its Entertainment Contents Business segment is involved in the development and sale of digital game software, packaged game software, and amusement machines; development and operation of amusement centers; planning, production, and sale of animated films; and development, manufacture, and sale of toys. The company's Resort Business segment develops and operates hotels and golf courses, etc. in integrated resorts business and other facilities businesses. Sega Sammy Holdings Inc. was founded in 2004 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
